source: User approved proceeding with TASK-088 move slice.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Fresh validation is preferred; policy may require it for high-risk semantic gates.

next_loop.reason: The next compiler loop should start from the build handoff, not the producing compiler context.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

summary: Accepted TASK-088 web UI move slice from adapter layer to src/ui/web.

diff_table.current_state: Control Room browser UI implementation lives under src/adapters/web for historical reasons.
diff_table.desired_state: Move Control Room browser UI implementation to src/ui/web and keep adapters focused on launch/protocol translation.
diff_table.rationale: Web UI is product UI, not an agent harness adapter.
diff_table.risk: Medium: path move can break imports/package inclusion without compatibility wrapper and tests.

accepted_decisions.summary: Move web UI implementation to src/ui/web.
Keep compatibility wrapper at src/adapters/web/control-room.ts while downstream imports migrate.
